sentence_reviews.text: Shared local kernels exploit translation structure and efficiently aggregate nearby information.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Deep Learning convolutional networks chapter covers convolution, local receptive fields, parameter sharing, equivariance/translation structure, pooling, and tensor/image inputs; PML/AIMA provide signal, image, and tensor background.
sentence_reviews.notes: The cited source set directly supports the claim at the level stated.

sentence_reviews.text: Its benefit depends on implementation, scale, data, and hardware; the same mechanism can add complexity without improving the target workload. Its direct dependencies include Signal processing & harmonic analysis, Images, video & spatial grids.

sentence_reviews.notes: Limitation is reviewed as a broad synthesis/tradeoff statement for the family-level node, not as a direct quotation from one source.
